heading: RELIEF
operative_text: A parent of a student enrolled in a school district may seek relief for a violation of this subchapter by filing a grievance through the district's grievance procedure adopted under Section 26.011.
_note: Enacted by Acts 2025, 89th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1125 (S.B. 12), Sec. 7, eff. September 1, 2025.
